info.description: List of all endpoints used in API
info.title: Appworks API

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by ustomer name (contains ignore case

parameters.name: external-ids
parameters.description: Filter by external ids (comma separated list)

parameters.name: customer-external-ids
parameters.description: Filter by customer types (comma separated list)

parameters.name: owner-user-external-ids
parameters.description: Filter by customer owner users (comma separated list)

parameters.name: creation-time-from
parameters.description: Filter by creation time FROM (iso date-time)

parameters.name: creation-time-to
parameters.description: Filter by creation time TO (iso date-time)

parameters.name: update-time-from
parameters.description: Filter by update time FROM (iso date-time)

parameters.name: update-time-to
parameters.description: Filter by update time TO (iso date-time)

parameters.name: force-update
parameters.description: Should an already existing customer be updated or left alone

409.description: The given external identifier is already used and the force update parameter is false

get.description: Retrieve a collection of generated invoices

parameters.name: with-records
parameters.description: Should the response contain the records (invoice lines)

parameters.name: with-footer
parameters.description: Should the response contain the footer (summary)

parameters.name: customer-external-id
parameters.description: Filter by customer external identifier (contains ignore case)

parameters.name: project-name
parameters.description: Filter by product name (contains ignore case)

parameters.name: task-external-id
parameters.description: Filter by task type identifier (contains ignore case)

parameters.name: task-states
parameters.description: Filter by task states (comma separated list)

parameters.name: external-ids
parameters.description: Filtery by task idetifiers (comma separated list)

parameters.name: finished-time-from
parameters.description: Filter by finish time FROM (iso date-time)

parameters.name: finished-time-to
parameters.description: Filter by finish time TO (iso date-time)

parameters.name: update-time-from
parameters.description: Filter by last update time FROM (iso date-time)

parameters.name: update-time-to
parameters.description: Filter by last update time TO (iso date-time)

parameters.name: creation-time-from
parameters.description: Filter by creation time FROM (iso date-time)

parameters.name: creation-time-to
parameters.description: Filter by creation time TO (iso date-time)

parameters.name: force-update
parameters.description: Should an already existing task be updated or left alone

parameters.name: open-if-possible
parameters.description: Should the created task be opened or not

409.description: The given external identifier is already used and the force update parameter is false

address.description: Address (eg. name part of a street). Can be used to store the whole address.

address_type.description: Address ty (eg. street, square). Required if the address will be used for invoicing. Also required if the system is configured that way.

type.description: The type of the email address. Types can be defined in the administration menu.

tax_number.description: Tax number. Required if customer is a company.

company_external_id.description: Customers can be optionally connected to internal "companies" as a way to better organise our system.

contact_locations.description: A (COMPANY type) customer can have several contact locations. Can be empty.

contact_person_external_ids.description: A (COMPANY type) customer can have several other customers connected as contact persons. These customers must be already present in the system to be used here. Can be empty.

email_addresses.description: List of email address objects. Can be empty.

external_id.description: Identifier used by the integrated system.

firstName.description: First name. Required if the complex name setting is used in the selected customer type.

identity_document_type.description: Identity document type (ID card, passport, etc)

invoice_deadline_additional_days.description: The value set here will be used to calculate the default (payment) deadline of invoices issued to the customer.

lastName.description: Last name. Required if the complex name setting is used in the selected customer type.

name.description: Name. Required if the simple name setting is used in the selected customer type.

owner_group_ids.description: A customer can have several owner groups. Can be empty.

owner_user_external_ids.description: A customer can have several owner users. Can be empty.

parent_external_id.description: In a hierarchical customer system, this field identifies the current customer's parent. The parent must be already present in the system.

phone_numbers.description: List of phone number objects. Can be empty.

task_record_deadline_additional_days.description: The value set here will be used to calculate the default deadline of auto-generated tasks.

company_external_id.description: Customers can be optionally connected to internal "companies" as a way to better organise the AW system.

contact_locations.description: A (COMPANY type) customer can have several contact locations. Can be empty.

contact_person_external_ids.description: A (COMPANY type) customer can have several other customers connected as contact persons. These customers must be already present in the system to be used here. Can be empty.

customer_external_id.description: Customer type identifier used by the integrated system.

customer_id.description: Customer type identifier used by the AW system.

email_addresses.description: List of email address objects. Can be empty.

external_id.description: Identifier used by the integrated system.

id.description: Identifier used by the AW system.

identity_document_type.description: Identity document type (ID card, passport, etc)

invoice_deadline_additional_days.description: The value set here will be used to calculate the default (payment) deadline of invoices issued to the customer.

owner_group_ids.description: A customer can have several owner groups. Can be empty.

owner_user_external_ids.description: A customer can have several owner users. Can be empty.

parent_external_id.description: Customer parent identifier used by the integrated system.

parent_id.description: Customer parent identifier used by the AW system.

phone_numbers.description: List of phone number objects. Can be empty.

task_record_deadline_additional_days.description: The value set here will be used to calculate the default deadline of auto-generated tasks.

list_item_type_external_id.description: List item type external id used by the field definition

fields.description: Fields of the form. Can be empty.

extra.description: Extra data which can be presented at the bottom of the invoice (key-value pairs).

invoice_book_external_id.description: Invoice book used for the invoice. Only required if the selected settings' type is APPWORKS.

invoice_settings_external_id.description: Invoice settings used for the invoice.

language_code.description: Invoice language code. Not supported for APPWORKS invoices.

currency_code.description: Currency code. Currently only HUF is supported.

referenced_invoice_number.description: Referenced invoice number. Refrence to the previous invoice (in case of storno invoice).

invoice_number.description: The connected invoice number. (only used for export)

invoiced.description: true if the item was used for an invoice in the AW system. (only used for export)

zero_vat_rate_type.description: Must be present if and only if the selected VAT rate is 0

currency_code.description: Currency code (string). Currently the only supported value is HUF.

zero_vat_rate_type.description: Cause of the 0% VAT. Required if VAT rate is 0%.

currency_code.description: Currency code (string). Currently the only supported value is HUF.

vat_amount.description: Sum aount of VAT in line.

zero_vat_rate_type.description: Cause of the 0% VAT. Required if VAT rate is 0%.

invoice_book_external_id.description: Invoice book used for the revert. Only required if the selected settings' type is APPWORKS.

invoice_settings_external_id.description: Invoice settings used for the revert.

zero_vat_rate_type.description: Cause of 0% VAT. Required if VAT is 0%.

params.description: List item parameters defined in the AW system

request_id.description: NAV request id. Only required if the export state is not EXPORT_NEEDED or EXPORT_NOT_NEEDED

PostalAddress.description: A valid postal address can either be complex or text. Certain addresses can only be complex (eg. invoice address).

code.description: Custom code field. Can be used to identify previously imported lines.

custom_net_price.description: Custom net price set by the user.

dispersion_percent.description: Dispersion percentage (used only in visitation mode)

invoice_number.description: The connected invoice number. (only used for export)

invoiced.description: true if the item was used for an invoice in the AW system. (only used for export)

stock_external_id.description: Stock external id that containes/contained the selected item

assignee_external_id.description: Assignee user identifier used by the integrated system.

customer_record_external_id.description: Customer identifier used by the integrated system.

external_id.description: Identifier used by the integrated system.

project_external_id.description: Project identifier used by the integrated system.

assignee_external_id.description: Assignee user identifier used by the integrated system.

customer_record_external_id.description: Customer identifier used by the integrated system.

external_id.description: Identifier used by the integrated system.

id.description: Identifier used by the AW system.

project_external_id.description: Project identifier used by the integrated system.
